name: Aventus
description: The exceptional Aventus was inspired by the dramatic life of a historic emperor, celebrating strength, power and success.

name: Sauvage Eau de Toilette
description: A radically fresh composition, dictated by a name that has the ring of a manifesto. Raw and noble all at once.

name: Acqua Di Gio
description: Born from the sea, the sun, the earth, and the breeze of a Mediterranean island. A fresh aquatic signature.

name: Bleu de Chanel
description: An ode to masculine freedom expressed in a woody aromatic fragrance with a captivating trail.

name: Wood Sage & Sea Salt
description: Escape the everyday along the windswept shore. Waves breaking white, the air fresh with sea salt and spray.

name: Neroli Portofino
description: Tom Ford captures the cool breezes, sparkling clear water, and lush foliage of the Italian Riviera.

name: Silver Mountain Water
description: Captures the purity and freshness of the Swiss Alps with notes of green tea and blackcurrant.

name: Light Blue Pour Homme
description: The essence of Mediterranean joy of life, capturing the sun-drenched summer days and ocean breeze.

name: Bergamote 22
description: A dazzling bergamot that combines freshness, sweetness, and complexity with a touch of woodiness.

name: Cool Water
description: The legendary marine fragrance, bringing an intense wave of fresh, revitalizing aquatic energy.

name: Acqua Di Gio Profondo
description: A deep dive into the ocean's blue, mixing aromatic elements and mineral salts.

name: Allure Homme Sport
description: A fresh and sparkling fragrance with an active, sporty, and clean energy.

name: Pour Homme
description: A classic Mediterranean composition capturing zesty citruses and light floral undercurrents.

name: L'Homme
description: A superb clean soapy scent utilizing Iris and Neroli to create a crisp office signature.

name: Replica Lazy Sunday Morning
description: Recreates the comforting feeling of fresh clean linen, warm sunbeams, and rumpled cotton sheets.

name: Bal d'Afrique
description: A warm, floral-fresh fragrance inspired by Paris in the late 1920s and its infatuation with African culture.

name: Y Eau de Parfum
description: A deep, fresh, and masculine fragrance with notes of sage, apple, and warm woods.

name: Lime Basil & Mandarin
description: Our signature fragrance. Peppery basil and aromatic white thyme bring an unexpected twist to mandarins.

name: Green Irish Tweed
description: A stroll through the Irish countryside. Freshly cut grass, spring rain, and fresh mountain herbs.

name: Philosykos Eau de Toilette
description: An ode to the entire fig tree: the green freshness of the leaves, the wood, and the milky sap.

name: Un Jardin sur le Nil
description: An olfactory stroll along the banks of the Nile, bursting with green mango, lotus, and sycamore wood.

name: Juniper Sling
description: A playful tribute to the bright and crisp cocktail, London Dry Gin, filled with icy juniper berries.

name: Colonia
description: The classic definition of Italian refinement. Crisp citruses blended beautifully with light aromatics.

name: Tacit
description: A fresh and green fragrance, inspired by the Mediterranean coast and clean herbal gardens.

name: L'Eau Papier
description: A celebration of musk, ink and paper, smelling like warm steamed rice and clean stationery.

name: No. 5 Eau de Parfum
description: The very essence of femininity. A legendary, timeless floral bouquet made famous by Marilyn Monroe.

name: J'adore
description: An ode to women, their audacity and beauty. A golden, voluptuous floral bouquet.

name: Bloom
description: Designed to celebrate the authenticity, vitality and diversity of women, smelling like a garden in bloom.

name: Chloe Eau de Parfum
description: A fresh and feminine rose blend, perfect for a chic and romantic signature.

name: Delina
description: A floral bouquet dominated by Turkish rose, lily of the valley and peony, with sweet, tart lychee notes.

name: Flowerbomb
description: An explosive floral bouquet. A sweet, addictive sensation of thousands of jasmine and rose petals.

name: Rose 31
description: Transforms the famous feminine Grasse Rose into an assertively virile and woody spice fragrance.

name: English Pear & Freesia
description: The essence of autumn. The sensuous freshness of just-ripe pears wrapped in a bouquet of white freesias.

name: Do Son Eau de Parfum
description: Inspired by childhood memories in Indochina, smelling of fresh tuberose carried by a warm sea breeze.

name: La Tulipe
description: Recreates the clean, early morning freshness of spring gardens and the green smell of fresh tulips.

name: L'Interdit Eau de Parfum
description: A tribute to bold femininity. A white flower bouquet cutting through dark, earthy woody base notes.

name: Carnal Flower
description: A majestic tuberose infused with green eucalyptus freshness, turning into a creamy, carnal embrace.

name: La Vie Est Belle
description: A sweet gourmand floral signature featuring patchouli, iris, and a massive burst of sugar praline.

name: Daisy
description: Bright and playful, capturing violet leaves and wild strawberries in a fresh white wood garden.

name: Libre Eau de Parfum
description: The fragrance of freedom. Tension between French lavender and burning Moroccan orange blossom.

name: Amyris Femme
description: A bright and elegant fragrance, blending Jamaican amyris wood and Florentine iris in a solar kiss.

name: Spring Flower
description: A playful, fresh floral blend capturing peach and apricot notes with fresh spring blossoms.

name: Elisabethan Rose
description: A regal and demanding rose, blending earthy hazelnut leaf and velvety petals fit for a queen.

name: Inflorescence
description: A wild garden rising at spring. A crisp, green floral tribute to new garden blooms.

name: Peony & Blush Suede
description: Flirtatious peonies in voluptuous bloom, paired with the bite of red apples and soft blush suede.

name: Twilly d'Hermes
description: A daring perfume of ginger spiciness and opulent tuberose, designed for active young women.

name: Love Don't Be Shy
description: An absolute marshmallow-orange blossom treat. Succulent sugar vanilla and innocent flowers.

name: Miss Dior Eau de Parfum
description: An olfactory 'millefiori' garden. Centifolia Rose, iris, and fresh peony under creamy woods.

name: Jasmin Rouge
description: A saturated, spiced floral signature of decadent jasmine and rich, dark spices.

name: Portrait of a Lady
description: A baroque rose. A heavy dose of Turkish rose blended with patchouli, incense, and deep cinnamon.

name: Santal 33
description: The fragrance of the American West. A heavy dose of dry cardamom, leather, and creamy sandalwood.

name: Oud Wood
description: One of the most rare, precious, and expensive ingredients in a perfumer's arsenal, oud wood.

name: Terre d'Hermes
description: A narrative structure exploring the chemistry of earth and flint, featuring orange and vetiver.

name: Royal Oud
description: Wood, leather, marble and gold. A grand, dry cedarwood with a subtle, dark oud core.

name: Gypsy Water
description: A glamorization of the Romany lifestyle, based on the scent of fresh soil, deep pine forests and campfires.

name: Tam Dao Eau de Parfum
description: A memory of East Asian temples and high mountain forests. Creamy Mysore Sandalwood.

name: Encre Noire
description: A dark, moody vetiver that smells like damp forest earth, dark ink, and fresh cypress leaves.

name: Grey Vetiver
description: A masterfully clean vetiver infused with citrus, rosemary and light, modern woods.

name: Sycomore Exclusif
description: A noble, smoky vetiver from Chanel's high art line, conveying dry, majestic autumn woods.

name: Wonderwood
description: An overdose of wood. A deep, dense forest filled with cypress, cedar, and deep spices.

name: Hwyl
description: An escape to the ancient Japanese hinoki cypress forests, smoky, dark, and earth-bound.

name: Bowmakers
description: Smells like the deep workshops of pioneer violin makers. Varnished woods, pine, and resin.

name: English Oak & Hazelnut
description: An enchanted walk. The crunch of green hazelnuts followed by roasted oakwood trails.

name: Super Cedar
description: Warm, dry pencil shavings. Modern cedar wood softened by a light rose top note.

name: Sacred Wood
description: An absolute homage to genuine Indian Mysore Sandalwood. Creamy, spiritual, and deep.

name: Feminite du Bois
description: A pioneer woody fragrance for women. Deep dry cedarwood sweetened by ripe plum and hot cinnamon.

name: Vetiver 46
description: A dark, smoky vetiver combined with deep church incense, pepper, and dry cedar.

name: The Tragedy of Lord George
description: The classic English gentleman. Booze, soap, and tonka wood. Elegant, traditional, and regal.

name: Replica Under the Lemon Trees
description: Strolling through Palermo's lemon groves. Sun-drenched leaves, zesty lemon skin and soft cedarwood.

name: Eau Duelle Eau de Parfum
description: An elegant, dry vanilla, balanced by dark black tea and smoky frankincense wood.

name: Voyage d'Hermes
description: A lively, active woody spice blend, bursting with green cardamom pods and dry woods.

name: Mojave Ghost
description: A woody composition inspired by the soulful beauty of the Mojave Desert, featuring dry sandalwood.

name: Fahrenheit
description: A classic legend. The famous 'gasoline' violet leaf, combined with heavy leather and cedar.

name: Bois Marocain
description: Captures the dry, dark warmth of Moroccan thuja wood workshops, smelling like hot cedarwood resins.

name: Premier Figuier
description: The world's first fig fragrance. Earthy fig leaves, creamy coconut milk, and dry sandalwood.

name: Baccarat Rouge 540
description: Luminous and sophisticated. Lays on the skin like an amber, floral and woody breeze.

name: Black Opium
description: Highly addictive feminine fragrance. Fascinating and seductive with rich black coffee and vanilla.

name: Tobacco Vanille
description: Tom Ford reinvents classic tobacco with sweet vanilla, cocoa, dry fruit, and sweet wood sap.

name: Angels' Share
description: Inspired by the family heritage of cognac-makers. Rich cognac oil, cinnamon bark, and oak barrels.

name: Shalimar
description: The world's first oriental fragrance. Inspired by the love story between an emperor and a princess.

name: Black Orchid
description: A dark, dramatic blend of black orchids, hot spices, and sweet Mexican chocolate.

name: Replica By the Fireplace
description: Recreates the cozy warmth of a crackling fire. Roasted chestnuts, smoky wood, and sweet vanilla.

name: Spicebomb
description: An explosion of spices. Tension between icy hot peppers and addictive, dry tobacco.

name: Layton
description: A noble, gourmand amber, matching fresh lavender and apple top notes with rich vanilla and cardamom.

name: Bois d'Argent
description: A private legend. Creamy powdery iris, wrapped in sweet honey, leather, and cypress wood.

name: Grand Soir
description: Dressing up for a Paris night. An absolute warm amber vanilla wrapped in smoky resins.

name: Ambre Sultan
description: An absolute reference for amber. A thick, herbal oregano opening turning into deep, resinous benzoin.

name: Musc Ravageur
description: A sensual, animalic amber musk, spiced with cinnamon bark, cloves and dark woody base notes.

name: Replica Jazz Club
description: Recreates the ambiance of a Brooklyn jazz club. Rum cocktails, leather armchairs and sweet tobacco smoke.

name: Noir Extreme
description: A spiced amber gourmand featuring Indian Kulfi dessert notes, saffron, cardamom, and warm vanilla.

name: Velvet Haze
description: A sweet patchouli haze, layered with coconut water, raw cacao shells, and wild musk.

name: Halfeti
description: Inspired by the black roses of Turkey. A heavy, spiced rose blended with dry leather, saffron, and oud.

name: Tuxedo
description: A structured scent matching violet leaf greenness with dark patchouli, ambergris and bourbon vanilla.

name: Herod
description: An absolute vanilla-tobacco pipe luxury. Warm, rich, sweet, and comforting wood resins.

name: Ambre Narguile
description: An warm apple pie, honey, hot cinnamon bark, caramel and tobacco. Addictive and luxurious.

name: Noir Exquis
description: A French patisserie rendezvous. Warm roasted chestnuts, maple wood sap, coffee, and rich vanilla.

name: Myrrh & Tonka Intense
description: The noble myrrh resin from Namibia, combined with sweet, almondy vanilla and toasted tonka bean.

name: Sublime Vanille
description: An airy, elegant vanilla, balanced by clean musk and bright Italian bergamot.

name: Pi
description: An absolute classic vanilla-almond benchmark, designed for bold explorers.

name: Lost Cherry
description: A full-bodied journey into the once-forbidden; a contrast of sweet cherry liqueur and bitter almond.
